name: uplink-monorepo
description: Local-first personal Repository for AI conversations

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tower1229/uplink-repository && npm run build --workspace @tower1229/uplink
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @tower1229/uplink-repository && npm run build --workspace @tower1229/uplink-repository && npm run typecheck --workspace @tower1229/uplink
